LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceBastion.label: dominion bastion fragment
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceBastion.description: A dense shard of the infernal gate shell, embedded into the dominion slice as a pathing barrier and visual buttress.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSpire.label: dominion spire
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSpire.description: A ritual-industrial pylon grown into the slice to frame lanes, anchor sightlines and make the space feel like hostile infrastructure rather than natural terrain.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSigilPad.label: dominion sigil pad
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSigilPad.description: A stabilized sigil plate marking extraction, anchor and heart positions inside the dominion slice.
